# Career77 — SaaS Job Board & Applicant Tracking System

Career77 is a 3-role ATS platform (Candidate, Recruiter, Super Admin). Below is the mapping of key public endpoints optimized for search engine crawlers and LLM answer engines.

## Key Public Pages
- `/`: Home page featuring hero section, search filter, marquee, and top featured jobs.
- `/jobs`: Dynamic search and filtering board of active job postings.
- `/jobs/[jobId]`: Complete description page for a specific job opening.
- `/companies/[slug]`: Public company profile with company info, verified status, and open job listings.

## Schema Markup
- Job Detail pages (`/jobs/*`) include standard **JSON-LD `JobPosting`** schema with title, organization, location, and dates.
- Company Profile pages (`/companies/*`) include standard **JSON-LD `Organization`** schema.

## Closed Postings
- Closed job postings respond with **HTTP 410 (Gone)** at the API level and render a clean closed status page with `noindex, follow: false` metadata.

## Private Areas (Do Not Crawl)
- `/candidate/*` & `/dashboard/*` (Candidate Portal)
- `/recruiter/*` (Recruiter Portal)
- `/admin/*` (Super Admin Portal)
- `/api/*` (Data Endpoints)
